RULING:
The Court notified the parties its tentative ruling -- overruled; 5 days to answer. Then the matter was argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT LEONARD KACZMARSKI'S DEMURRER -- Overruled; defendant has 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (PHA/301/SL) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
